title: micrampelis coulteri
intro: Micrampelis coulteri, also known as Coulter's Mountain Miter or Western Mountain Miter, is a type of evergreen shrub in the heath family that is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Micrampelis coulteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
